untranslatable_reason: The signal specifies custom SMA periods (12 and 26) which are not in the allowed indicator list. Allowed SMAs are: sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, sma_40, sma_50, sma_80, sma_100, sma_200. Additionally, the momentum check condition 'short_ma > previous bar short_ma' requires prev_sma_12, which is not available. The closest available approximation would use sma_10 and sma_20, but this significantly changes the signal intent.
translation_notes: Signal requires non-standard SMA periods (12/26 instead of standard offered lengths). If forced to use available indicators, could substitute sma_10 (short) and sma_20 (long), but this alters the original signal design.
